findings.title: cache_info key display omits extended_hours — ambiguous duplicate-key rows in /api/cache output
findings.why_it_matters: Two separate cache entries that differ only by extended_hours=True vs False display the same key string in /api/cache output. The cache itself is correct (full 6-tuple key), but the diagnostic endpoint becomes ambiguous when both variants are cached simultaneously during a debugging session.
evidence: Cache key at line 428: (ticker.upper(), start, end, interval, source, extended_hours) — 6-tuple
Display key at line 503: f"{ticker} {interval} {start}→{end} [{source}]" — _ext is discarded
F28c fix correctly unpacks _ext but does not include it in the display string
findings.suggested_fix: Change display key to: f"{ticker} {interval} {start}\u2192{end} [{source}]{chr(32) + chr(43) + chr(101) + chr(120) + chr(116) if _ext else chr(39) + chr(39)}"

findings.title: OptimizerPanel NaN guard omits steps field — misleading error message on non-numeric input
findings.why_it_matters: parseInt of a non-numeric string returns NaN, then || 0 converts to 0, causing the steps < 2 check to fire with the message Steps must be at least 2 rather than Steps must be a valid integer. Not a crash, but the error message is misleading when the user types non-numeric text into the steps field.
evidence: parseInt("abc") returns NaN, NaN || 0 = 0, steps < 2 fires
The new isNaN guard at line 107 covers min/max but not steps
findings.suggested_fix: Add before the minN/maxN NaN check: if (isNaN(parseInt(p.steps))) { setError(`"${opt.label}": Steps must be a valid integer`); return }

residual_risks: cache_info extended_hours display gap: if debugging a session with both extended and non-extended cache entries for the same symbol, the /api/cache output will show duplicate-looking keys — pre-existing, minor.

ChartSkeleton shows only on isLoading (first-fetch with no cache), not on isFetching (refetch with stale cache). This is intentional react-query v5 behavior and the correct UX, but means the skeleton will not appear on manual refetch or stale-revalidation cycles.
testing_gaps: No test covers UpdateBotRequest validator with invalid logic values (e.g. buy_logic=XOR) to confirm the validator fires for all 6 Optional fields.
No test exercises cache_info() after a _fetch() call with extended_hours=True to verify the 6-tuple unpack fix end-to-end.
No test for OptimizerPanel runOptimizer() with non-numeric min/max inputs to confirm the new NaN guard fires.
